title: lithocardium obliquum
intro: Lithocardium obliquum, also known as Lithospermum obliquum, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support cardiovascular health by acting as a vasodilator and lowering blood pressure. The health benefits of Lithocardium obliquum include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Lithocardium obliquum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, or capsules, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine.
